creator: frankde@osbti.com
text:
Hi,

I run an IT Support & Solutions company. (www.osbti.com.au)
One of our specialities is the Support, Administraton and Installation of FreeBSD in SME Server Environments.

I would like to have OsBTI Pty Ltd listed in your directory of consultants if at all possible.

Through our team of technicians, we provide support both OnSite and Remotely to both Australia and small select International clients.

Thanks,

Frank.

OsBTI Pty Ltd
http://www.osbti.com.au
Level 1, 474 St Kilda Rd
Melbourne, VIC, 3004, Australia
